description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, dark gray roof and a combination of large, grid-style windows and solid wall sections. The front facade features a double garage, a prominent entryway with steps, and a spacious patio area. The rear of the house includes a large fenced terrace or backyard, accessible through wide glass doors and windows. The exterior walls are finished in a mix of light-colored plaster and stone or brickwork, giving the house a contemporary yet robust appearance. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some sections featuring floor-to-ceiling glass panels. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat gray roof, large grid windows, and a mix of plaster and stone exterior. Features include a double garage, spacious patio, and a fenced backyard terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway with steps, large windows, and a patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof, side windows, and the fenced backyard area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large fenced terrace, extensive glass doors and windows, and the mix of wall materials.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall sections, side windows, and the continuation of the stone base.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a covered porch, large glass door, and adjacent patio area
